content.en:
Soon, Ye Tian's name appeared on the Taigu Gold Tablet.

Endless Heavenly Ancestor, the fifth assessment in the Inner Domain

This mark is that Ye Tian has passed the fifth assessment of the Inner Domain.

At this time, all the Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors were dumbfounded, a little unbelievable!

After all, even an ancient-level genius like the Heavenly Ancestor of the Dark Sword had only passed the third assessment, and none had passed the fourth assessment, while Ye Tian had directly passed the fifth assessment, completely crushing other primordial-level geniuses!

is also an ancient level genius, why is there such a big gap!

The inscription of the ancient gold tablet is over at this moment, and the next thing is the reward.

Airplanes!!!!

The Ancient Golden Tablet ingested a boundary-breaking genius and an ancient genius into the Ancient Golden Tablet, and no one knew what rewards each primeval-level genius would get.

But what can be known is that the primeval-level geniuses who break into the inner region get the most benefits, especially the primeval-level geniuses who break into the inner region for the first time or come to participate in the primeval gold tablet assessment for the first time, get the most benefits.

Like the Stygian Sword Genius, he has come to participate many times, so the resources he obtains are definitely not as good as the new primordial-level geniuses.

......

Ye Tian entered the inner domain of the Ancient Golden Tablet and silently waited for the reward of the Ancient Golden Tablet.

Airplanes!!!!

Dense primeval characters poured into Ye Tian's body.

Ten!

Hundred!

Thousands!

10,000!

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of thousands of primeval golden inscriptions were accepted by Ye Tian, although he did not comprehend them, he just gave them to him for enlightenment.

But this is the unimaginable benefit of other primeval-level geniuses, if all these hundreds of thousands of primeval golden texts are comprehended, it is conceivable that it will not be difficult for him to create the primeval bone technique.

Of course, the reward of the Taikoo Gold Tablet is naturally far inferior to this.

In the void, drops of golden substance appeared, landed in front of him, and gathered into a small lake.

This is also the reward given to him by the Taikoo Golden Tablet!

"What is this ......?"

Ye Tian didn't know it, it seemed to be somewhat similar to the Taigu Golden Water, but it was much more terrifying than the energy contained in the Taigu Golden Water.

He took out a drop of golden substance and refined it to test the effect.

Rumble!!!!

This drop of golden substance turned into energy to quickly refine Ye Tian's heart, allowing his heart, which had not progressed for a long time, to quickly refine and become stronger and stronger.

"This substance has an effect on refining the heart, so many golden substances, I'm afraid it can make my heart quench to the extreme of the seven blood transformation realms!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited, he felt that it might not be long before he could break through to the Eight Blood Transformation Realm!

He didn't cultivate here, but directly put it away.

After that, there are no rewards!

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian was ostracized from the Taigu Golden Monument.

At the same time, other Blood Transformation Realm powerhouses were also excluded.

At this time, every Blood Transformation Realm cultivator who had received the reward was in a good mood.

Afterwards, all the practitioners left the place.

Ye Tian also left with Ye Xingchen.

At this time, Hayes Heavenly Ancestor reminded Ye Tian: "Endless Heavenly Ancestor, be careful, maybe there are more powerful primordial-level geniuses who will do something to you!"

"Thanks for the reminder!"

Ye Tian thanked.

......

In the impact of the seam of the territorial waters, Ye Tian took Ye Xingchen to quickly cast Taigu and hurried away.

With the speed at which he moved his primeval body, ordinary primeval-level geniuses couldn't catch up with him at all.

Abrupt.

A figure appeared in the void and intercepted him directly.

"Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor!"

Ye Tian recognized it.

This Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor was an eight-time Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and he was also an ancient-level genius, his strength far surpassed him, enough to kill him in an instant.

This one is really ruthless, he has no scruples at all, and directly attacks him.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, you are not qualified for those rewards, give it to me!"

The Hitomi Heavenly Ancestor made a move.

At this time, Ye Tian put his son Ye Xingchen into the void in his body, and then disappeared in an instant.

Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor stretched out his hand and grabbed it, and his face suddenly changed: "Huanyu Tower!"

An ancient-level genius broke into the Cosmos Tower, and after obtaining a certain amount of authority, he had the qualifications to use the Cosmos Tower to move three times to save his life, and he also knew this.

But an ancient-level genius has broken through the territorial sea boundary for countless years, how could the three opportunities not be used!

Who doesn't run into danger?

Therefore, those primordial-level geniuses who have been famous for a long time have long used up their three opportunities.

But he didn't expect that Ye Tian still had the opportunity to use the Huanyu Tower, so he missed the opportunity to kill him.

......

Universal City.

Ye Tian appeared here, and then ordered his other copy body to move all the Terrans of the Sword Chenhai away.

He felt that with the ruthless methods of the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, he was afraid that he would directly enter the Sword Chen Sea.

Meanwhile.

He also left the Universal City, and there was no way to protect him.

Whew!!

Ye Tian and the Terrans were all in hiding, and he didn't believe that the Heavenly Ancestor of the Pupil Heart could find him.

After a while, the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor really came to Jianchen Sea, and when he didn't see Ye Tian, he was immediately very angry, and after breaking into pieces with a blow to Jianchen Sea, he left here.

And the news that the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor was chasing and killing Ye Tian naturally spread out quickly.

Ancient territorial waters.

Taikoo Mountain.

Mo Yu Heavenly Ancestor recalled the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor.

The Heavenly Ancestor of the Pupil Heart came back as soon as possible.

"Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, you made a move on the Endless Heavenly Ancestor, who made you do it!" Mo Yu Heavenly Ancestor said angrily.

To provoke such a demonic enemy for Taigu Mountain, he didn't know what the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor was thinking.

Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor said indifferently: "It's just a seven-time Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, even if the talent is demonic, I can kill him with one hand." It's just that he used the chance of the Huanyu Tower to save his life, which allowed him to escape!"

"You want the reward of the Endless Heavenly Ancestor, but his reward may not be for you. He passed the fifth assessment of the Inner Domain, and he also received a reward, maybe his cultivation will soon break through to the eighth blood transformation realm, or even the ninth blood transformation realm, and it will be very easy to kill you at that time. Mo Yu Heavenly Ancestor said coldly.

If it weren't for the fact that the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor was a disciple of the Mountain Lord, he would have sanctioned the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor a long time ago.

"Mo Yu Heavenly Ancestor, I don't need you to take care of my affairs!

Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor said.

Then, the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor left again to find Ye Tian's traces.

However, it was not so easy to find Ye Tian.

Moreover, Ye Tian still has a copy of his body, even if he finds it, what if he finds it?

......

Territorial sea boundary cracks, a fragment somewhere.

Ye Tian put the Terran here, and then sealed it off, not allowing any Terran to leave.

"Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, you are looking for death!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

He immediately retreated, refining the golden substances rewarded by the Ancient Golden Tablet to impact the Eight Blood Transformation Realms.
